name: kkRepo
desc: kkRepo is a Nexus-compatible, self-hosted artifact repository for Maven, npm, PyPI, Go, Helm, NuGet, Cargo/Rust, Dart/Pub, Docker/OCI, RubyGems, and Yum artifa…
descFull: kkRepo is a Nexus-compatible, self-hosted artifact repository for Maven, npm, PyPI, Go, Helm, NuGet, Cargo/Rust, Dart/Pub, Docker/OCI, RubyGems, and Yum artifacts. It supports one-click migration from Nexus to kkRepo.
